intro: Neoshirakia is a plant species, also known as Neoshirakia millefolium, that belongs to the family Celastraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing pain, inflammation, and improving immune function.
